openings.name: London System
openings.description: A solid d4 system centered around the early Bf4 development.

openings.name: Catalan Opening
openings.description: A hypermodern opening combining d4 with a kingside fianchetto.

openings.name: Slav Defense
openings.description: A solid reply to 1.d4 with c6, supporting the d5 pawn without blocking the light-squared bishop.

openings.name: Queen's Gambit Accepted
openings.description: Black captures the c4 pawn, accepting the gambit and fighting for the center later.

openings.name: Queen's Gambit Declined
openings.description: Black declines the gambit with e6 or Nf6, maintaining central tension.

openings.name: Sicilian Dragon
openings.description: The Dragon variation of the Sicilian Defense with g6 and Bg7.

openings.name: Sicilian Defense (Other)
openings.description: Non-Dragon Sicilian variations including Rossolimo, Grand Prix, Alapin, and Smith-Morra.

openings.name: Indian & Semi-Slav
openings.description: Indian defenses and Semi-Slav systems against 1.d4.

openings.name: Other Openings
openings.description: Englund Gambit, Benoni Defense, Grünfeld, King's Indian, and other lines.
